hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | grep -E '\.py$' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && python3 -m py_compile "$f"; } 2>&1 || true

jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "UserPromptSubmit", additionalContext: "Reminder for this turn: if you hit something non-obvious (data mapping, API contract surprise, join failure, residency friction), append it to GOTCHAS.md before moving on. The PoC primary deliverable is GOTCHAS.md, not the code. See CLAUDE.md non-negotiables."}}'

F="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/GOTCHAS.md"; if [ -f "$F" ]; then echo "## Recent gotchas:"; tail -30 "$F"; else echo "GOTCHAS.md not yet created \u2014 capture the first non-obvious thing you hit this session."; fi
